page_metadata.biotools__summary: Computational detection of significant variation in binding affinity across two sets of sequences. The binding sites are modeled as matches to a, possibly gapped, position weight matrix (PWM) which is presumed to be known.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Computational detection of significant variation in binding affinity across two sets of sequences. The binding sites are modeled as matches to a, possibly gapped, position weight matrix (PWM) which is presumed to be known.
